user.title: Aurora Energy (Aurora+) Setup
user.description:
To authenticate, visit https://shtrom.github.io/AuroraPlus in your browser, log in with your Aurora Energy account, and copy the **id_token** shown on the page. Then paste it into the field below.

Note: the token is only valid for a short time — complete this step promptly after copying it.

data_description.id_token: The id_token JWT string obtained from the Aurora+ login tool

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Aurora Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your Aurora+ session has expired. Visit https://shtrom.github.io/AuroraPlus in your browser, log in again, and paste the new **id_token** below.

data_description.id_token: The id_token JWT string obtained from the Aurora+ login tool

error.invalid_token: The token is invalid or has expired. Please obtain a fresh token and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Aurora+ API. Check your network connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication was successful. Your Aurora+ data will resume updating.
